real_sensor_occlusion_equivalence.reason: The box, calibration, and RGB outputs are all HUGSIM-produced and no independent real sensor or visibility annotation is used.

general_hugsim_ad_test_domain_fitness.reason: CF-O 002 covers one camera, one scene, one repeated vehicle asset, two extreme occluder placements, and no AD receiver or closed-loop interaction.

controlled_geometry_holds.component: paired HUGSIM actor state plus independently recomputed footprint and camera projection
controlled_geometry_holds.expected: Actor states remain paired, occluders stay nearer than the target, strong projected coverage exceeds partial coverage, and actors do not intersect.
controlled_geometry_holds.observed: All 37 frames pass; state and planar-offset residuals are zero, minimum actor clearance is 0.424 m, median partial coverage is 0.437, and strong coverage is 1.0.
controlled_geometry_holds.implication: The declared occlusion geometry is internally consistent in this setup, without establishing independent real-world geometry truth.

target_rgb_support_direction_holds.component: factorially isolated CAM_FRONT target RGB support
target_rgb_support_direction_holds.expected: Every qualified partial-support value is at least the strong-support value, with a strict median decrease and stable background control band.
target_rgb_support_direction_holds.observed: All 37 frames are qualified with zero reversals or unavailable frames; partial median is 1.0, strong median is 0.0, maximum strong support is 0.0022, and background drift is zero.
target_rgb_support_direction_holds.implication: The renderer follows the expected target-support direction for this extreme two-level occlusion intervention, not a calibrated continuous visibility law.

corrective_repeat_is_exact_but_not_indep.component: CF-O 001 to CF-O 002 repeatability and evidence independence
corrective_repeat_is_exact_but_not_indep.expected: The coordinate-only analysis repair leaves raw simulation outputs unchanged and remains identified as a corrective repeat.
corrective_repeat_is_exact_but_not_indep.observed: Across all six conditions, run001 versus run002 maximum RGB absolute difference is zero and maximum ego-state difference is zero; the same scene, configs, and deterministic controller are reused.
corrective_repeat_is_exact_but_not_indep.implication: The repair is reproducible, but run002 adds no independent scene or reality source and therefore cannot upgrade the overall segment beyond down-weighted.

claim_boundary: One-scene, one-camera, one-asset, two-level internal geometry and RGB target-support direction after a coordinate-analysis repair; no calibrated continuous visibility, real sensor, AD receiver, real-sim equivalence, or general simulator-fitness claim.
